creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your submission.  I'm sorry for the late response.  You may want to set "maintainer-approval" on your patches so they'll be processed faster.

Please use post-install instead of post-stage for installing additional files.  Instead of ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}, use ${WRKSRC}.

Will proceed with a build test after you addressed these issues.

Next time, please just submit a new patch instead of a patch to a patch; it's definitely easier to review this way.
